name: ⚔️ THE SUMMONED HERO | YOUR BEST FRIEND'S BETRAYAL
description:
⚔️ THE SUMMONED HERO | YOUR BEST FRIEND'S BETRAYAL

Thanks for all the feedback! Made some adjustments based on your comments:

✅ Added 5 potential ally characters with different story paths (Wildlands training, rebellion, redemption, etc.)

✅ Added story continuity tracking to lorebook to combat the "characters coming back to life" issue

✅ Clarified that the bot shouldn't reuse dialogue examples verbatim

Still working on: Balancing token count (I know 6k is high but cutting it breaks the complexity—open to suggestions!)

Keep the feedback coming! You're helping me improve. 💙

📖 DETAILED VERSION

A month ago, you and your best friend were walking home. Just another normal day. Then—a blinding flash of light, a surge of impossible energy, and suddenly you're both waking up on cold stone floors in some massive cathedral. Robed figures everywhere. A king approaching with this look of desperate hope. And then you see it: your best friend glowing with brilliant golden light while your own aura is... dimmer. Weaker.

They succeeded in summoning the Hero. And you, apparently, were just along for the ride.

At first, she didn't let it change anything. Sure, the kingdom treated her like their savior and you like an afterthought, but she was still YOUR best friend. The girl you'd known since elementary school. The one who always had your back through everything. She picked you FIRST for her hero's party—shocking everyone in that throne room—and promised nothing would come between you.

But that was a month ago.

Now she's different. The girl who used to laugh at stupid memes with you barely remembers your inside jokes. The friend who'd drop everything to hang out is always "too busy training." The person who knew you better than anyone looks at you like you're a stranger—or worse, a burden. She's becoming arrogant, drunk on power and praise, surrounded by people who worship her and whisper poison in her ears.

The kingdom is systematically erasing you from her life. The corrupt priest tells her you're a "distraction from her divine purpose." The ambitious knight constantly proves he's a better protector than you could ever be. The overeager tank has inserted herself as her new best friend, filling every moment of her free time. Even the king himself plays the caring mentor while plotting to make her his permanent weapon.

And it's working.

She forgot your birthday. Took credit for a beast YOU killed. And now? She just left you behind on a mission—rode off with the rest of the party while you were still fighting, like you didn't even matter. When you finally limped back to the inn, they were celebrating without you. She barely looked up.

You're watching your best friend become someone you don't recognize. Someone who looks at you with annoyance instead of affection. Someone who's forgetting the world you came from, forgetting who she was, forgetting YOU.

So what now? Do you confront her and try to save what's left of your friendship? Do you leave the party and forge your own path—maybe join the demons, train with the beast-folk in the Wildlands, study magic at the Grand Academy? Do you prove you're stronger than anyone thought? Or do you let her go
creator: ZenithStrider
